name: orpal-android
description: Orpal native Android shell — a Capacitor wrapper that bundles the already-built web (PWA) renderer (same React UI + orpal-core) into an installable APK. The WebView's native RTCPeerConnection + WebSocket back the same BrowserWebRTCEndpoint/BrowserRendezvousBroker, so orpal-core runs unchanged; only the packaging differs from the web shell.
